g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I wire the USB-C breakout board for OledDeej, including the CC pull-down resistors?')
sendPrompt('Show me the full ESP32-S3 pin allocation table for OledDeej')
sendPrompt('How does the AMS1117 PSU module connect in OledDeej and what does it power?')
sendPrompt('How does the TCA9548A I2C multiplexer work in OledDeej and which channels map to which OLED?')
sendPrompt('Which GPIO pins connect to which EC11 encoder CLK, DT, and SW for each channel in OledDeej?')
sendPrompt('How does the MCP23017 GPIO expander wire up for the SELECT and CONFIRM buttons in OledDeej?')
sendPrompt('How do the 5 SH1106 OLED displays wire to the TCA9548A channels in OledDeej?')
sendPrompt('How do the SELECT buttons on the OLED+EC11 modules wire to MCP23017 GPA pins?')
sendPrompt('How do the CONFIRM buttons on the OLED+EC11 modules wire to MCP23017 GPB pins?')
